# unmold CLI Documentation

Version:

## Overview

- Primary HTML documentation: https://unmold-labs.github.io/unmold-cli/index.html
- Root command: unmold
- Command sections: 5
- Maximum command depth: 2

## Commands

- unmold
  URL: https://unmold-labs.github.io/unmold-cli/index.html#unmold
  Summary: Version:
  Usage: $ unmold [COMMAND]
  Version: 0.1.1
  Subcommands: module, help, login, logout

- unmold module
  URL: https://unmold-labs.github.io/unmold-cli/index.html#unmold-module
  Summary: DESCRIPTION
  Usage: $ unmold module

- unmold help
  URL: https://unmold-labs.github.io/unmold-cli/index.html#unmold-help
  Summary: Version:
  Usage: $ unmold [COMMAND]
  Version: 0.1.1
  Subcommands: module, help, login, logout

- unmold login
  URL: https://unmold-labs.github.io/unmold-cli/index.html#unmold-login
  Summary: FLAGS
  Usage: $ unmold login [--browser] [--timeout <value>]
  Options: --[no-]browser, --timeout=<value>

- unmold logout
  URL: https://unmold-labs.github.io/unmold-cli/index.html#unmold-logout
  Summary: DESCRIPTION
  Usage: $ unmold logout
